workflow.name: Workflows Ongoing Intake Live
workflow.goal: Seed an ongoing intake workflow with enough active and reworked work to exercise the Workflows rail, board, history, and live-console surfaces during observation.

parameters.intake_contract: At least one intake item should request changes before a corrected resubmission is approved so the Workflows board and history remain interesting during capture.

actions.goal_template: Keep the ongoing Workflows observation corpus active for intake item {index:02d}.
actions.acceptance_criteria_template: Produce a triage packet with summary, controls, owner handoff, and next action for item {index:02d}.
actions.notes_template: Observation item {index:02d} should keep the workflow active long enough for Workflows UI evidence capture.
